stat_only_definition_1: NLR = 2 x Np(single LR sector, #theta_{lab} = 53.4 deg)
stat_only_definition_2: NUD = 2 x Np(single UD sector, #theta_{lab} = 53.4 deg)
stat_only_definition_3: R_{LRUD} = (NLR - NUD) / (NLR + NUD); no coincidence gate is used
stat_only_definition_4: NLR #propto #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 - #sqrt{3}/2 T22 pyy - #sqrt{2}/4 T20 pyy)]
stat_only_definition_5: NUD #propto #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{3}/2 T22 pyy - #sqrt{2}/4 T20 pyy)]
stat_plus_T_definition_1: NLR = 2 x Np(single LR sector, #theta_{lab} = 53.4 deg)
stat_plus_T_definition_2: NUD = 2 x Np(single UD sector, #theta_{lab} = 53.4 deg)
stat_plus_T_definition_3: R_{LRUD} = (NLR - NUD) / (NLR + NUD); no coincidence gate is used
stat_plus_T_definition_4: NLR #propto #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 - #sqrt{3}/2 T22 pyy - #sqrt{2}/4 T20 pyy)]
stat_plus_T_definition_5: NUD #propto #int d#theta d#phi [d#sigma/d#Omega x (1 + #sqrt{3}/2 T22 pyy - #sqrt{2}/4 T20 pyy)]
